title: Mass Spectrometry Analysis and Molecular MS/MS Network
author: Rene Flores Clavo
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.br2fm8bn
materials: Inject 3 µL of each sample , then conduct operation and spectra analyses using Xcalibur software (version 3.0.63) developed by Thermo Fisher Scientific

steps.title: Resuspend the dry extract in 1...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the dry extract in 1 mL of methanol (HPLC grade) and dilute 100 µL in 900 µL of methanol (HPLC grade).

steps.title: Filter the final solution using a syringe-filter into vials
steps.instruction: Filter the final solution using a syringe-filter into vials

steps.title: Perform Ultra-high pressure liquid chromatography-mass spectrometry...
steps.instruction: Perform Ultra-high pressure liquid chromatography-mass spectrometry (UHPLC-MS) analyses in a Thermo Scientific QExactive® Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap Mass Spectrometer. Stationary phase: Thermo Scientific Accucore C-18 2.6 µm (2.1 mm x 100 mm)

steps.title: Set the following parameters in the spectrometer
steps.instruction: Set the following parameters in the spectrometer: positive mode, capillary voltage at +3.5 kV; capillary temperature at 250 °C; S-lens of 50 V and m/z range of 133.40-2000.00

steps.title: Perform tandem mass spectrometry (MS/MS) using...
steps.instruction: Perform tandem mass spectrometry (MS/MS) using normalized collision energy (NCE) of 30 eV and 5 precursors per cycle

steps.title: Set the following conditions in the column mobile phase
steps.instruction: Set the following conditions in the column mobile phase: 0.1% formic acid (A) and acetonitrile (B). Eluent profile (A: B) 0-10 min, gradient from 95:5 up to 2:98; held for 5 min; 15-16.2 min gradient up to 95:5; held for 8.8 min. Flow rate: 0.2 mL min -1

steps.title: Create a molecular network for Streptomyces sp
steps.instruction: Create a molecular network for Streptomyces sp. using the online workflow at GNPS ( https://gnps.ucsd.edu/ ) for molecular networking analysis.

steps.title: Filter the data by removing all...
steps.instruction: Filter the data by removing all MS/MS peaks within ± 17 Da of the precursor m/z

steps.title: Window filter the MS/MS spectra by...
steps.instruction: Window filter the MS/MS spectra by choosing only the top 6 peaks in the ± 50 Da window throughout the spectrum

steps.title: Cluster the data with MS-Cluster with...
steps.instruction: Cluster the data with MS-Cluster with a parent mass tolerance of 0.02 Da and an MS/MS fragment ion tolerance of 0.02 Da to create consensus spectra

steps.title: Create a network where edges were...
steps.instruction: Create a network where edges were filtered to have a cosine score above 0.5 and more than 5 matched peaks

steps.title: Keep further edges between two nodes...
steps.instruction: Keep further edges between two nodes in the network only if each of the nodes appeared in each other's respective top 10 most similar nodes

steps.title: Search the spectra comparining with those...
steps.instruction: Search the spectra comparining with those in the network GNPS’ spectral libraries

steps.title: Filter the library spectra in the...
steps.instruction: Filter the library spectra in the same manner as the input data.

steps.title: Keep all matches of network and...
steps.instruction: Keep all matches of network and library spectra that have a score above 0.5 and at least 5 matched peaks
